query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "trust-region behavior blending for on-policy distillation" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the core mechanism of "on-policy distillation" and "behavior blending" by proposing a symmetric knowledge distillation framework that aligns intermediate thought processes, satisfying criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (b) for measuring the dependent variable (distillation performance) on the same domain (LLMs). Although it does not explicitly use the "Trust-Region" terminology, it provides the canonical alternative-vocab
